# Asmari Formation

**Summary**: An Oligocene carbonate formation in the Arabian region.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] analyzed the asmari-formation to determine its internal members and age.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] reef and shelf environments

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Asmari Formation is represented by 110m of limestone divided into three distinct members (Sandy Marl, Reefal Limestone, Nummulitic Limestone). ([[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992, p. 64]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[1992-el-sahn|El-Sahn, 1992]] partially recrystallized, locally dolomitized
